final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand color and typography guideline poster for RAN QIU, a Chinese autumn fragrance brand.

Style/medium: editorial brand guideline poster, minimalist layout design, clean Swiss-style typography system
Composition: centered layout with generous white space, three distinct sections stacked vertically (primary color / secondary colors / typography), grid-based alignment
Subject: brand color swatches with hex codes, type specimen showing "染秋" and "RAN QIU" in both Chinese and Latin scripts, seasonal autumn visual cues
Scene/backdrop: neutral off-white or cream paper texture, subtle shadow depth for printed material feel
Color palette: warm autumn tones derived from osmanthus gold, persimmon orange, maple red, amber brown as primary; muted complementary neutrals as secondary
Text (verbatim): "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must display primary color + secondary colors + typography specifications clearly; Chinese characters must be legible at all sizes; suitable for brand book printing
Avoid: gradients unless essential for color demonstration; cluttered layouts; generic sans-serif without character; Behance trendy style; 8K stuffer words
